## CronJob v1beta1 to batch/v1 Migration Files

### Core API & Conversion (kubernetes/kubernetes)

| Layer | Key Files |
|-------|-----------|
| Internal types | `pkg/apis/batch/types.go` — hub type with `TimeZone *string` |
| v1 conversion | `pkg/apis/batch/v1/conversion.go`, `zz_generated.conversion.go` |
| v1beta1 conversion | `pkg/apis/batch/v1beta1/conversion.go`, `zz_generated.conversion.go` |
| v1 defaulting | `pkg/apis/batch/v1/defaults.go` — `SetDefaults_CronJob` (modern `ptr.To` style) |
| v1beta1 defaulting | `pkg/apis/batch/v1beta1/defaults.go` — `SetDefaults_CronJob` (older `new()` style) |
| Validation | `pkg/apis/batch/validation/validation.go` — `validateTimeZone`, `validateScheduleFormat` |
| Registry | `pkg/registry/batch/cronjob/strategy.go` — `DefaultGarbageCollectionPolicy` returns `OrphanDependents` for v1beta1, `DeleteDependents` for v1 |

### Key Differences Between Versions
- **GC policy**: v1beta1 uses `OrphanDependents` (backward compat), v1 uses `DeleteDependents`
- **Defaulting style**: v1 uses `ptr.To()` helpers; v1beta1 uses `new()` 
- **TimeZone**: Both v1 and v1beta1 carry `TimeZone *string` at v1.32, but validation logic (shared through the internal type) enforces TZ-in-schedule conflicts
- **Job type**: v1beta1 scheme only includes CronJob; v1 scheme also includes Job
